reason: All FR-02 acceptance criteria are fully met. (1) Telegram verification correctly uses SHA256(bot_token) as the HMAC secret key via hashlib.sha256(secret.encode()).digest(). (2) LINE verification uses channel_secret with HMAC-SHA256 + Base64 encoding. (3) Verification failure raises HTTPException(status_code=401) with detail string containing AUTH_INVALID_SIGNATURE in both missing-credentials and mismatch branches. (4) hmac.compare_digest() is used in all three verifier functions (verify_telegram_signature, verify_line_signature, _verify_hub_signature). (5) VERIFIERS dict registry is implemented via PlatformVerifier class with a register() method for adding new platforms. Test file confirms correct helper functions mirror the implementation algorithms exactly (compute_telegram_signature, compute_line_signature). No regressions observed; Messenger and WhatsApp bonus verifiers follow same pattern correctly.
